title: Computer Science Foundations
description: Learn and master the concepts of Computer Science Foundations with structured lessons, interactive visualizations, and practice exercises.

title: Programming Fundamentals
description: This course serves as the gateway to all software development and programming.

title: Object-Oriented Programming
description: This course teaches the programming paradigm used by Java, C++, C#, Kotlin, Swift, and many large-scale software systems.

title: Data Structures
description: This is one of the most important courses in computer science because nearly every efficient algorithm relies on choosing the right data structure.

title: Algorithms
description: This course teaches the methods used to solve computational problems efficiently and is the natural continuation after Data Structures.

title: Computer Organization
description: This course explains **how computers actually execute programs**, connecting software with hardware.

title: Operating Systems
description: This course explains how an operating system manages hardware resources and provides the environment in which applications run.

title: Computer Networks
description: This course explains **how computers communicate**, from local networks to the global Internet.

title: Databases
description: This course teaches how modern applications store, organize, retrieve, and manage data efficiently.

title: Software Engineering
description: This course focuses on **building reliable, maintainable, and scalable software systems** using industry best practices.

title: Web Development
description: This course teaches how modern websites and web applications are built from front end to back end.

title: Mobile Development
description: This course focuses on building modern mobile applications for Android and iOS using both native and cross-platform approaches.

title: System Design
description: This course teaches how to design software systems that can reliably serve millions of users.

title: Distributed Systems
description: This course explores how multiple computers work together as a single reliable system.

title: Compiler Design
description: This course explains **how programming languages are translated into executable machine code**.

title: Computer Graphics
description: This course explains how computers create and render visual images, animations, and interactive 3D worlds.

title: Artificial Intelligence
description: This course introduces the foundations of intelligent systems before moving into **Machine Learning**.

title: Machine Learning
description: This course focuses on **teaching computers to learn from data**, building on the broader AI concepts learned here.

title: Data Science
description: This course focuses on **extracting insights and value from data** by combining statistics, machine learning, programming, and visualization.

title: Cybersecurity
description: This is the final course and completes the **Computer Science curriculum**.
